name: Janis Joplin
title: Janis Joplin - taken at last concert 8/12/70, died of an overdose a few months later on 10/4/70, 27
description: Janis Joplin - taken at last concert 8/12/70, died of an overdose a few months later on 10/4/70, 27
bio: Janis Joplin was an American rock and blues singer known for her powerful, raw vocal style. She was one of the most successful and widely known female rock stars of the 1960s counterculture era.
